papers.title: Hilbert schemes of points on canonical surfaces
papers.summary: For $n\geq 1$, we investigate the Hilbert scheme of $n$-points on a surface $S$ with canonical singularities. We generalise the well-known theorem of Fogarty by showing that the underlying reduced subscheme of $\operatorname{Hilb}^n(S)$ is a normal variety of dimension $2n$ with canonical singularities, and for $n\leq 7$, we show that $\operatorname{Hilb}^n(S)$ is reduced. When $S$ has symplectic singularities over $\mathbb{C}$, we show that the underlying reduced subscheme of $\operatorname{Hilb}^n(S)$ also has symplectic singularities, thereby generalising a result of Beauville. Our results build on work of the first author with Gyenge, Gammelgaard and Szendrői that sought to identify the underlying reduced subscheme of the Hilbert scheme of $n$-points on a Kleinian singularity with a Nakajima quiver variety.

chinese_summary.problem: 研究具有典范奇点的曲面上点的Hilbert概型的几何性质，特别是其约化子概型的正规性、维数、奇点类型以及约化性条件。
chinese_summary.method: 利用先前将Kleinian奇点上点的Hilbert概型的约化子概型识别为Nakajima quiver variety的方法，通过局部模型和奇点分析，推广Fogarty定理。证明Hilb^n(S)的约化子概型是正规变种、维数2n且具有典范奇点；对于n≤7，用上同调或降维论证证明整体约化性；当S具有辛奇点时，证明约化子概型继承辛奇点。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 将Fogarty关于光滑曲面上Hilbert概型光滑性的定理推广到具有典范奇点的曲面，得到约化子概型的正规性和奇点类型；2. 将Beauville关于辛奇点上Hilbert概型保持辛奇点的结果推广到一般典范奇点曲面；3. 证明了当点数n≤7时Hilb^n(S)本身是约化的，部分解决了约化性问题。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中给出了定理的陈述，但没有提供证明细节或数值实验。证据来自理论论证，具体方法依赖于第一作者此前关于Kleinian奇点与Nakajima quiver variety的工作。
chinese_summary.limitations: 约化性只对n≤7成立，更大n的情形尚待解决；结果可能依赖于复数和特征0假设；需要阅读全文验证证明的完整性和方法的普适性。

papers.title: Anomaly cancellation for two $U(1)$ factors
papers.summary: We show that solving the abelian part of the local anomaly cancellation conditions for a 4-d gauge theory whose gauge Lie algebra has an abelian summand with rank $K \geq 1$ is equivalent to the problem in algebraic/arithmetic geometry of finding $(K-1)$-dimensional projective linear subspaces of a cubic hypersurface over the rational numbers, where the cubic is determined by the data of the semisimple summand and the representation thereof carried by the Weyl fermions. We then use this reformulation to solve a variety of examples with rank 2. The simplest non-trivial example from physics, namely gauge Lie group $U(1)^2$ and six fermions, nevertheless has a rich (and well-studied) geometry: it corresponds to the Fano variety of lines in the Segre cubic primal threefold. This is a surface with 15 irreducible components that are planes (which correspond to lines lying in the 15 planes in the Segre cubic primal and which give rise to non-chiral fermions) and 6 components that are split del Pezzo surfaces of degree 5 (which give rise to chiral fermions). These components are all rational varieties, enabling all solutions to the anomaly cancellation conditions to be parametrized and their collective properties (e.g. their topology and asymptotic distribution) to be described.

chinese_summary.problem: 将4维规范理论中局部反常消除条件的求解问题转化为代数几何中寻找有理数上三次超曲面的射影子空间问题，并具体对两个U(1)因子的情况给出几何描述和参数化解。
chinese_summary.method: 利用代数几何方法，将反常消除条件等价于寻找有理数上三次超曲面的(K-1)维射影线性子空间。对于秩2的情况，具体对应Segre三次原像中的直线族（Fano variety），其分支由平面和分裂的del Pezzo曲面组成，并利用这些几何对象参数化所有解。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 首次将阿贝尔部分反常消除问题系统地转化为代数几何中的子空间寻找问题，建立了物理与代数几何的精确对应。2. 对秩2情形完整刻画了解空间的几何结构，包括15个平面分量和6个分裂del Pezzo曲面分量，并利用有理性实现全局参数化。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要明确指出对U(1)^2和六个费米子案例，解空间对应于Segre三次原像的Fano variety，并描述其15个平面分量和6个分裂del Pezzo曲面分量，且所有分量均为有理簇，从而可实现参数化和拓扑描述。正文摘录未提供额外实验证据，但理论推导完整。
chinese_summary.limitations: 论文仅处理了秩2的情况，对于更高秩（K>2）虽然给出了一般等价性，但未提供具体解的例子或算法。物理模型假设了特定的规范群和费米子表示，适用范围有限。且需要读者具备代数几何和量子场论双重背景。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文核心使用了代数几何中的Fano variety、Segre cubic、del Pezzo曲面等概念，与研究方向中的variety、projective scheme、moduli space等关键词高度匹配。具体几何对象（如直线族、有理曲面）是代数几何的经典研究对象，且arXiv分类为math.AG，直接相关。

papers.title: Recovering Kodaira types from $\ell$-torsion on elliptic curves
papers.summary: The classical Néron-Ogg-Shafarevich criterion characterises good reduction of an elliptic curve $E$ over a $p$-adic field via the action of inertia on the $\ell$-adic Tate module. However, the action of inertia on $E[\ell]$ is not sufficient to distinguish between potentially good and multiplicative reduction, and the action on $T_{\ell}(E)$ is not sufficient to determine the Kodaira type. We remedy this situation by endowing $E[\ell]$ with a distance function that records the $p$-adic distances between the $x$-coordinates of the points. We show that, equipped with this additional structure, $E[\ell]$ determines the Kodaira type of the elliptic curve. In the case of residue characteristic $2$, we assume that $E$ does not have potentially good reduction of type $I_n^*$.

chinese_summary.problem: 经典Néron-Ogg-Shafarevich准则通过惯性作用在ℓ-adic Tate模上可以刻画椭圆曲线的良约化，但惯性作用于ℓ-挠点E[ℓ]不足以区分潜在良约化和乘性约化，且T_ℓ(E)上的惯性作用不足以确定Kodaira类型。论文旨在解决如何仅用E[ℓ]上的信息恢复椭圆曲线的Kodaira类型。
chinese_summary.method: 在ℓ-挠点集E[ℓ]上额外定义一个p-adic距离函数，记录点的x坐标之间的p-adic距离，然后证明这个带有距离结构的E[ℓ]足以唯一确定椭圆曲线的Kodaira类型。在剩余特征为2时，需排除潜在良约化类型I_n^*的情况。
chinese_summary.innovation: 将p-adic距离结构（记录x坐标间距离）引入ℓ-挠点，克服了经典惯性作用信息不足的局限，使得仅凭E[ℓ]（而非整个Tate模）即可区分各种约化类型并确定Kodaira类型，这是对Néron-Ogg-Shafarevich准则的精细化和补充。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确声称证明了上述结论，但未提供具体证明细节、例子或实验验证，因此证据强度仅限于作者声称。
chinese_summary.limitations: 剩余特征为2时需额外排除I_n^*型潜在良约化；论文仅11页且为初版，证明细节和适用范围需阅读全文确认；未说明ℓ如何选取（是否与p互质等）。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接涉及椭圆曲线在p-adic域上的约化理论、Tate模、惯性作用等，与算术几何中的椭圆曲线、p-adic域、约化类型等关键词高度匹配，且问题的解决对理解局部域上椭圆曲线的算术有直接贡献。

papers.title: On the $K$-theoretic logarithmic double ramification class
papers.summary: The logarithmic double ramification cycle is the virtual fundamental class of the locus where a line bundle on a family of curves is fiberwise trivial. We construct a K-theoretic logarithmic double ramification class and prove a product formula and a \(\mathrm{GL}_r(\mathbb Z)\)-invariance property. We also give an explicit formula for this class in terms of a Grothendieck polynomial via a novel $K$-theoretic Thom--Porteous formula for vector bundles on algebraic stacks.

papers.title: Wall-crossing for Hilbert schemes
papers.summary: The goal of the minimal model program for the Hilbert scheme of points on a surface aims is to describe the (stable) base loci of all divisors, their associated birational models, and the maps between them. We answer all of these questions for the Hilbert scheme of points on the blowup of the affine plane at the origin. The birational models are Brill-Noether loci in a larger Hilbert scheme, and nested variants thereof, and the wall-crossing maps are described as explicit projections. We also establish several new facts about the homogeneous coordinate ring of this Hilbert scheme, including finding the minimal set of line bundles whose sections generate the ring.

papers.title: Reduction modulo p of crystalline Galois representations via μ_p-equivariance
papers.summary: For a crystalline representation of the absolute Galois group of Q_p, with given Hodge-Tate weights, we obtain new constraints on the inertial weights of its mod p reduction. This allows us to formulate an explicit Serre weight conjecture, in the generality of L-parameters for unramified connected reductive groups over Q_p, and to prove the elimination direction of this conjecture. The proof uses prismatic techniques to show that the reductions modulo p of the Breuil-Kisin modules attached to crystalline Galois representations acquire a natural μ_p-equivariant structure. Combining this with results on the geometry of the μ_p-fixed points of affine Grassmannians leads to our new constraint.

papers.title: Koszul Duality for Coherent Sheaves
papers.summary: We establish a bounded derived Koszul duality for infinite-dimensional Koszul algebras, and we obtain the corresponding singular Koszul duality. We then apply this framework to two classes of Koszul algebras, namely quadratic monomial algebras and absolutely Koszul algebras satisfying an additional homological condition. For these classes, the general duality specializes to particularly well-behaved forms. As an application to algebraic geometry, let \(Λ\) be a commutative noetherian Koszul algebra generated in degree \(1\), and let \(X=\operatorname{Proj}(Λ)\). We obtain a Koszul-dual description of the bounded derived category \(\mathsf{D}^{b}\!\bigl(\operatorname{coh}(X)\bigr)\). This gives a BGG-type correspondence for projective schemes defined by commutative noetherian Koszul algebras.

papers.title: On the number of Frobenius periodic vector bundles on elliptic curves
papers.summary: This paper counts Frobenius-periodic vector bundles on elliptic curves over an algebraically closed field of characteristic $p>0$. By translating the problem into continuous representations of the étale fundamental group, it derives explicit generating functions and exact-period formulas, with separate treatments of the ordinary and supersingular cases.

chinese_summary.problem: 计数特征p>0代数闭域上椭圆曲线的Frobenius周期向量丛的数量。
chinese_summary.method: 将问题转化为étale基本群的连续表示，通过表示论方法导出显式生成函数和精确周期公式，分别处理普通和超奇异椭圆曲线的情况。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次给出Frobenius周期向量丛的精确计数公式，区分普通和超奇异情形，并利用étale基本群的连续表示建立对应关系。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要明确给出了显式生成函数和精确周期公式，但未提供具体数值或实验验证。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅适用于代数闭域上的椭圆曲线，未考虑更一般的曲线或数域情形；正文摘录缺失，无法核验具体推导细节。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文研究椭圆曲线上的Frobenius周期向量丛，涉及étale基本群、Frobenius作用等概念，与算术几何中椭圆曲线、Frobenius、étale上同调等关键词高度相关。

papers.title: Descendability and descent in topological weaves
papers.summary: We prove a criterion for a finitely presented surjection of algebraic spaces to be descendable in a topological weave. We apply this to show that étale motivic spectra satisfy $h$-descent on noetherian finite-dimensional schemes with residue fields of uniformly bounded étale cohomological dimension. We also show that rational motivic cohomology satisfies arc-descent in weights $\le 1$, and we construct the ``forgetting supports'' isomorphism $f_! \simeq f_*$ for a proper DM-type morphism of Artin stacks, in rational motivic sheaves.

chinese_summary.problem: 为拓扑编织（topological weaves）中的有限表现满射代数空间建立可下降性判据，并应用该判据证明étale motivic谱在具有一致有界étale上同调维数的诺特有限维概形上满足h-下降，同时证明有理motivic上同调在权≤1时满足弧下降，并构造Artin栈上真DM型态射的遗忘支撑同构f_!≃f_*。
chinese_summary.method: 首先给出拓扑编织中有限表现满射的下降性判据；然后应用该判据证明étale motivic谱的h-下降和有理motivic上同调的弧下降；最后在有理motivic层范畴中，利用拓扑编织技术为Artin栈上的真DM型态射构造f_!≃f_*同构。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1) 建立了拓扑编织中下降性的新判据，拓展了经典下降理论。2) 首次证明了étale motivic谱在更一般的概形（具有一致有界étale上同调维数）上满足h-下降。3) 在权≤1时证明了有理motivic上同调的弧下降，并构造了Artin栈上遗忘支撑同构，为代数栈上的motivic方法提供新工具。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确给出了三个主要结果：可下降性判据、étale motivic谱的h-下降、有理motivic上同调的弧下降以及遗忘支撑同构。正文摘录未提供额外实验或系统证据，但论文包含定理证明（v2修正了错误）。
chinese_summary.limitations: 拓扑编织的定义及具体技术细节需要阅读全文；结果依赖于拓扑编织的框架，可能涉及高度抽象的理论；部分结果（如弧下降）仅在权≤1时成立，一般权重尚待研究。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文核心处理代数空间和Artin栈上的下降问题，直接涉及descent（fppf、étale、h、arc）、模空间、代数栈等术语，与研究方向中的descent理论、代数栈、概形态射性质紧密匹配。同时，étale motivic谱和有理motivic上同调属于motivic理论，与代数几何中Chow群、周环等有交叉。

papers.title: Modular elliptic curves and hyperbolic uniformization
papers.summary: In an article published a few years before the modularity of elliptic curves over $\Q$ was proved, Mazur \cite{maz} looked at modularity as a purely complex analytic phenomenon, defining a notion of an elliptic curve over $\Q$ having a hyperbolic uniformisation of arithmetic type. Such an elliptic curve (of conductor $N$, say) is necessarily geometrically modular, i.e. a quotient of the jacobian of the modular curve $X_0(N)$, by a morphism defined over $\Q$. We extend these ideas to elliptic curves over totally real fields of odd degree, using Shimura curves for quaternion algebras split at all finite places and one real place. In particular, we prove that the existence of a hyperbolic uniformisation of arithmetic type would imply geometric modularity.

chinese_summary.problem: 推广 Mazur 关于有理数域上椭圆曲线具有算术型双曲均匀化蕴含几何模性的结果，到奇次全实域上的椭圆曲线。
chinese_summary.method: 利用在有限位分裂且恰在一个实位分裂的四元数代数构造 Shimura 曲线，替代经典模曲线；通过定义全实域上椭圆曲线的算术型双曲均匀化概念，并证明该均匀化的存在性蕴含该椭圆曲线是相应 Shimura 簇雅可比商（几何模性）。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 将 Mazur 的算术型双曲均匀化概念从有理数域扩展到任意奇次全实域，并证明其仍蕴含几何模性；2. 利用更一般的 Shimura 曲线（而非仅模曲线）处理一般全实域上的椭圆曲线，突破了经典模曲线仅在有理数域上适用的限制。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要明确陈述了推广思路和核心结论：对于奇次全实域上的椭圆曲线，算术型双曲均匀化的存在性推出几何模性。正文摘录未提供额外实验或计算证据。
chinese_summary.limitations: 结果仅覆盖奇次全实域，未涉及偶数次或更一般的全实域；仅证明充分性，未讨论必要性或构造具体例子；正文摘录有限，需阅读全文确认技术细节和证明完备性。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接研究椭圆曲线的模性（elliptic curve, modularity），使用 Shimura 曲线（Shimura variety）和全实域（totally real field），与研究方向关键词‘椭圆曲线’、‘模曲线’、‘Shimura 簇’、‘全实域’高度匹配；同时涉及几何模性、雅可比商等算术几何核心概念。

papers.title: Positive Cones of Parabolic Grassmann Bundle over a curve
papers.summary: In this article, we define the parabolic Grassmann bundle associated to a parabolic vector bundle over a smooth projective variety, generalizing the construction of parabolic projective bundles developed in \cite{BL}. We determine its Néron--Severi group and compute its nef, pseudoeffective, and Mori cones over smooth projective curves. We also compute the corresponding cones for the fiber product of two parabolic Grassmann bundles over a smooth projective curve.

chinese_summary.problem: 定义光滑射影簇上抛物向量丛的抛物Grassmann丛，并计算其在光滑射影曲线上 的Néron-Severi群、nef锥、伪有效锥和Mori锥，以及两个抛物Grassmann丛纤维积的对应锥。
chinese_summary.method: 推广抛物射影丛的构造（参见文献[BL]），利用抛物向量丛定义抛物Grassmann丛；通过研究其Néron-Severi群和正锥的生成元，利用射影丛上的经典结果和抛物结构进行明确计算。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 首次引入抛物Grassmann丛的概念，将抛物射影丛的构造推广到更一般的Grassmannian情形；2. 完整确定了曲线上抛物Grassmann丛及其纤维积的正锥（nef、伪有效、Mori锥），这是对抛物向量丛几何的深化。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要明确声称已定义抛物Grassmann丛并计算了Néron-Severi群及三类正锥，但未给出具体数值或证明细节，需阅读全文确认计算方法与结果。
chinese_summary.limitations: 计算仅针对光滑射影曲线上的抛物Grassmann丛及其纤维积，更高维基簇情形未涉及；另外，抛物结构的标记（quasi-parabolic type）可能影响结果，但摘要未明确。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文核心属于代数几何（math.AG），直接处理向量丛、射影丛、Grassmann丛、Néron-Severi群及正锥，与研究方向关键词（projective bundle, vector bundle, variety, intersection theory）高度匹配；抛物结构与模空间中的向量丛紧化相关，可能涉及代数栈理论。

papers.title: Local-global compatibility of automorphic Galois representations over CM fields at $p$
papers.summary: Let $F$ be a CM number field; then, to any cuspidal, regular algebraic automorphic representation of $\mathrm{GL}_n(\mathbf{A}_F)$ is associated a compatible system of $p$-adic Galois representations of the absolute Galois group of $F$. We prove that these representations are potentially semi-stable, in the sense of $p$-adic Hodge theory, and satisfy compatibility with the local Langlands correspondence, up to semi-simplification.

papers.title: The Stable Adjunction in $\mathbb{A}^1$-Homotopy Theory
papers.summary: We prove a homotopical monadicity theorem for the adjunction between the suspension spectrum and zeroth space functors in motivic stable homotopy theory. Our proof verifies that motivic stable homotopy theory satisfies the hypotheses of the general monadicity theorem of arXiv:2607.12124. In the process, we demonstrate six preliminary results in simplicial motivic homotopy theory, the main technical ingredient being a weak commutativity theorem between the zeroth space functor and realization of simplicial motivic spectra. We also elaborate on a general framework relating monadic algebras under op-lax maps of monads. This monadic framework is used in the proof of the main results and may be of independent interest as well. These simplicial results, and the accompanying monadic framework, may provide tools toward a conjectured operadic recognition principle for motivic infinite loop spaces.

chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将一般 monadicity 定理具体应用于 motivic 稳定同伦论中的悬垂谱-零空间伴随对，证明其是 monadic 的；同时提供了 simplicial motivic 同伦论中若干新结果以及一个可能具有独立意义的 monadic 代数框架，为 motivic 无限环空间的 operadic 识别原理提供了工具。

chinese_summary.limitations: 证明依赖 arXiv:2607.12124 的未发表结果；六个 simplicial 预备结果和弱交换定理的细节需阅读全文确认；实际适用范围可能限于特定的 motivic 范畴设置。

papers.title: Néron--Severi groups of proper schemes over finite fields
papers.summary: Let \(X\) be a proper reduced scheme over a finite field \(k\), let \(\ell\) be a prime different from \(\operatorname{char} k\), and write \(\ol X=X\times_{k}\ol k\) for its base change to an algebraic closure \(\ol k\) of \(k\). Call a class in \(\rH^{2}_{\et}(\ol X,\bbZ_{\ell}(1))\) \emph{Zariski-locally trivial} if it vanishes on a Zariski-open cover of \(\ol X\). We prove that the first Chern class map identifies \(\NS(\ol X)\otimes\bbZ_{\ell}\) with the group of Zariski-locally trivial classes whose image in \(\rH^{2}_{\et}(\ol X,\Ql(1))\) has weight zero. This is the finite-field analogue of a theorem of Barbieri-Viale--Rosenschon--Srinivas for proper seminormal complex varieties. In the finite-field setting neither seminormality nor irreducibility is needed.

papers.title: Asymptotic Cohomological Functions and Volumes on Proper Schemes
papers.summary: We study the behavior of asymptotic cohomological functions on proper schemes over a field. We prove a formula for how asymptotic cohomological functions behave under perturbation by an object in the bounded derived category. Using the same method, we also prove that the volume of a line bundle on any proper scheme over a field always exists as a limit.

papers.title: $p$-adic Maass--Shimura operators on $μ$-ordinary Igusa varieties
papers.summary: For Shimura varieties of Hodge type, we optimally extend algebraic Maass--Shimura differential operators on $p$-integral nearly holomorphic automorphic forms to differential operators on $μ$-ordinary Mantovan Igusa varieties. We then show that the rank one operators can be integrated to an action of an explicit formal group. Via $p$-adic Fourier theory, this provides a $p$-adic interpolation by extending the action of a symmetric algebra of differential operators to the algebra of functions on the Tate module of the dual $p$-divisible group. Passing to the generic fiber, we obtain an action of an explicit algebra of $p$-adic locally analytic functions, and we show that the action of the subalgebra of locally constant functions is equivalent to a natural Hecke action and thus preserves classical forms. In the ordinary case, we further show that the locally analytic action extends to nearly overconvergent automorphic forms. Our results extend, clarify, and recover prior constructions.

papers.title: On the Generalized Arithmetic Picard--Lefschetz Formula
papers.summary: This dissertation establishes an explicit arithmetic Picard--Lefschetz formula for isolated singularities of diagonal type. We investigate proper and flat families of varieties defined over a henselian discrete valuation ring of mixed characteristic. When the smooth generic fiber degenerates into a special fiber with isolated diagonal singularities, we construct an explicit eigenbasis for the tame inertia action on the local vanishing cycles. This construction yields a complete spectral decomposition, from which we deduce explicit formulas for the intersection pairing and the variation morphism. Furthermore, by computing the action of the geometric Frobenius operator on the subspace of inertia invariants, we establish an exact trace formula expressed in terms of Jacobi sums. We apply this theoretical framework to study the arithmetic of the symmetric powers of the Airy sheaf. By relating the compactly supported cohomology to degenerating affine hypersurfaces, we completely determine the local Galois representation for the $\ell$-adic realization of motives associated to Airy moments. This application provides a precise direct sum decomposition of the Galois module, a clear identification of the inertia invariants, and the explicit characteristic polynomial of the Frobenius action.

papers.title: Descendability and descent in topological weaves
papers.summary: We prove a criterion for a finitely presented surjection of algebraic spaces to be descendable in a topological weave. We apply this to show that rational motivic sheaves satisfy v-descent, and the same for étale motivic spectra on noetherian finite-dimensional schemes with residue fields of uniformly bounded étale cohomological dimension. We also construct the "forgetting supports" isomorphism $f_! \simeq f_*$ for a proper DM morphism of Artin stacks, in rational motivic sheaves.

papers.title: The Algebraic Montgomery-Yang Problem
papers.summary: We completely resolve the algebraic Montgomery - Yang problem, a conjecture of Kollar stating that every rational homology projective plane with quotient singularities and a simply-connected smooth locus has at most three singular points. The crux of our proof is a new lattice theoretic constraint, obtained by combining Donaldson's diagonalization theorem with the distinguished spin^c structure on the smooth locus whose determinant line bundle is the canonical bundle. Together with the orbifold Bogomolov - Miyaoka - Yau inequality, this constraint rules out all remaining cases in the problem and completes the proof.

papers.title: Exceptional rational functions of degree 5 over finite fields: classification by monodromy, ramification, and the Riemann-Hurwitz formula
papers.summary: We complete the classification of exceptional rational functions of degree 5 over any finite field $\mathbb{F}_{q}$ of characteristic different from 2 and 5, up to Möbius equivalence. Our approach employs the arithmetic and geometric monodromy groups, combined with the ramification structure of the associated cover and the Riemann-Hurwitz formula. The cyclic monodromy case yields precisely monomials and Rédei functions, while the dihedral case is resolved by analysing its inertia groups and branch points; this leads to Dickson polynomials and a non-polynomial family arising from rational 5-isogenies of elliptic curves. We also obtain partial classifications in characteristics 2 and 5: all cases with cyclic geometric monodromy and all dihedral cases admitting an $\mathbb{F}_{q}$-rational branch point are determined. The only unresolved cases are those with geometric monodromy group $D_{5}$ and no $\mathbb{F}_{q}$-rational branch point.

papers.title: Moduli spaces of snc klt KSBA stable pairs are naturally of log general type
papers.summary: We generalize work of Wei-Wu on Viehweg hyperbolicity for families of stable pairs over smooth projective varieties to the case of smooth Deligne-Mumford stacks. The results of Wei-Wu build on results of Popa-Schnell and Viehweg-Zuo, utilize a result of Campana-Păun, and extend results of Kebekus-Kovács and Patakfalvi. We apply our results to smooth proper moduli stacks parameterizing generically klt relatively simple normal crossings KSBA stable pairs, showing that such moduli stacks naturally have big log canonical bundles. We also consider implications for their coarse moduli spaces.

papers.title: Algebraizability of Vector Bundles over Real Algebraic Varieties
papers.summary: Let $X$ be an affine smooth real algebraic variety (in the sense of Bochnak, Coste, and Roy) and let $V$ be a topological vector bundle over $X(\mathbb{R})$. We investigate the problem of deciding whether $V$ is topologically isomorphic to an algebraic vector bundle using motivic homotopy theory. We prove that if $\dim X\leq 3$, then the algebraicity of Stiefel-Whitney classes is a necessary and sufficient condition for $V$ to be algebraizable. Next, we show that when $\dim X=4$ and $X(\mathbb{R})$ is compact, even if the characteristic classes of $V$ are algebraic, there is still an obstruction to algebraizing $V$ related to the Pontryagin class $p_1$ and the Stiefel-Whitney class $w_4$. Then we give some applications of this result. Namely, we give an example where this obstruction is nontrivial, and we investigate the group $\mathrm{K}_0(X)$.

chinese_summary.problem: 对于仿射光滑实代数簇X上的拓扑向量丛V，研究V何时与代数向量丛拓扑同构（即可代数化），其充要条件是什么。
chinese_summary.method: 运用动机同伦理论，通过分析Stiefel-Whitney类、Pontryagin类等特征类的代数性来刻画可代数化的障碍。具体地，当dimX≤3时，Stiefel-Whitney类可代数是充要条件；当dimX=4且X(R)紧时，即使特征类可代数，仍存在与p1和w4相关的障碍。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 将实代数簇上向量丛的可代数化问题与动机同伦理论结合，给出了低维（≤3）完整的充要条件。2. 发现了4维情形下超越特征类代数性的新障碍，即Pontryagin类p1与Stiefel-Whitney类w4的组合。3. 构造了障碍非平凡的显式例子，并探讨了对K0群的影响。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确给出定理：当dimX≤3时，Stiefel-Whitney类可代数充要；当dimX=4且X(R)紧时，存在由p1和w4给出的障碍。同时给出了一个障碍非平凡的例子以及对K0群的讨论。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅考虑仿射光滑实代数簇，且维数限于≤4；对于更高维或非仿射、非光滑的情形未覆盖。需要阅读全文验证具体构造和证明细节。

papers.title: Motivic quasimap wall-crossing for Grassmannians
papers.summary: We prove a wall-crossing formula for the Euler characteristics, considered as virtual mixed Hodge structures, of moduli spaces of $\varepsilon$-stable quasimaps to the Grassmannian $\mathbb{G}(r, N)$. For each $\varepsilon > 0$, we define a $\mathbb{Q}$-algebra automorphism of the ring of symmetric functions which takes the generating function for the $\mathbb{S}_n$-equivariant Euler characteristics of the moduli spaces of stable maps $\overline{\mathcal{M}}_{g, n}(\mathbb{G}(r, N), d)$ to the corresponding generating function for Toda's moduli spaces of $\varepsilon$-stable quasimaps $\overline{\mathcal{Q}}_{g, n}^{\varepsilon}(\mathbb{G}(r, N), d)$. The automorphism is given by explicit $q$-deformations of the power sum symmetric functions. The $\varepsilon \to 0$ limit of our formula exchanges the spaces of stable maps and the Marian--Oprea--Pandharipande moduli spaces of stable quotients. Our proof uses the geometry of relative Quot schemes to relate the quasimap spaces to moduli spaces of weighted stable maps, for which we obtain wall-crossing formulas via symmetric function theory.

chinese_summary.problem: 论文旨在证明到Grassmannian G(r,N)的ε-稳定准映射模空间欧拉特征（作为虚拟混合Hodge结构）的墙穿越公式，并将其与稳定映射模空间的生成函数联系起来。
chinese_summary.method: 定义了对称函数环上的Q-代数自同构，通过幂和对称函数的显式q-变形，将稳定映射模空间的S_n-等变欧拉特征生成函数转化为Toda的ε-稳定准映射模空间的对应生成函数。证明利用相对Quot scheme的几何将准映射空间与加权稳定映射模空间联系起来，并通过对称函数理论导出墙穿越公式。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 首次为Grassmannian上的准映射模空间建立了动机型墙穿越公式，推广了已知的稳定映射与稳定商之间的墙穿越。2. 给出了对称函数环上由幂和函数的q-变形定义的显式自同构，将不同ε值的生成函数相互转换。3. 揭示了ε→0极限下稳定映射模空间与Marian-Oprea-Pandharipande稳定商模空间之间的对偶关系。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确陈述了公式的证明、自同构的构造以及极限行为，但未提供具体数值验证或计算示例。证据主要基于理论推导和几何构造，需查阅全文确认细节。
chinese_summary.limitations: 公式依赖于对称函数理论和相对Quot scheme的几何，可能需要较深的组合与代数几何背景；未讨论一般目标簇的推广；墙穿越公式的显式性可能受限于Grassmannian的特殊性。

papers.title: Local monodromy of unit root F-isocrystals from Shimura varieties
papers.summary: We generalise a local $p$-adic monodromy theorem of Igusa that studies the monodromy representation associated to the universal elliptic curve around a supersingular point of the modular curve. Let $X$ be a smooth quasi-projective variety over $\mathbb{F}_p$. We set up and prove the analog of Igusa's theorem for overconvergent F-isocrystals on $X$ such that the action of the Frobenius is algebraic, $p$-plain, and semisimple at the closed points of $X$. We study the local monodromy of their unit root sub-objects around a point in $X$ with isoclinic Newton slopes. In particular, our result generalises Igusa's Theorem to overconvergent F-isocrystals arising from Shimura varieties, unconditionally for Shimura varieties of abelian type and conditional on Frobenius semisimplicity for exceptional Shimura varieties where this property is not known yet. In the particular case of Siegel Shimura varieties, we also prove an analogous result for the local monodromy of a point in the boundary of its compactification. As a consequence of our results, we prove a finiteness result for the reduction of the Hecke orbit of abelian varieties over a local field of equicharacteristic.

chinese_summary.problem: 推广Igusa关于模曲线超奇异点处通用椭圆曲线单值表示的局部p-adic单值定理到更一般的Shimura族上的过收敛F-等晶。
chinese_summary.method: 设定X为F_p上光滑拟射影簇，考虑X上Frobenius作用为代数、p-平凡且在闭点处半单的过收敛F-等晶，研究其单位根子对象在具有等斜Newton斜率的点附近的局部单值性。利用Shimura族和Siegel模族的边界性质，将Igusa定理推广到abelian类型Shimura族（无条件）和例外Shimura族（在Frobenius半单性假设下）。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 将Igusa的局部单值定理从模曲线推广到一般Shimura族上的过收敛F-等晶，涵盖更广泛的对象；2. 对Siegel模族还证明了紧化边界点的类似结果；3. 作为推论，得到特征p局部域上阿贝尔簇的Hecke轨道约化有限性。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确给出了定理成立的条件（Frobenius代数、p-平凡、半单）和推广的范围（abelian类型无条件，例外Shimura族有条件），并提到在Siegel情形得到了边界点结果和Hecke轨道约化有限性推论。但未提供具体证明细节或数值实验，理论证据需阅读全文核实。
chinese_summary.limitations: 例外Shimura族需要Frobenius半单性假设，该性质尚未完全证明；边界点结果仅对Siegel模族给出；需要确认过收敛F-等晶是否覆盖所有感兴趣的算术几何对象。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文研究Shimura族上的p-adic单值理论和单位根F-等晶，直接关联算术几何中的模空间、p-adic Hodge理论、伽罗瓦表示和特征p几何；结论中关于Hecke轨道的有限性涉及阿贝尔簇和丢番图几何，与研究方向关键词（elliptic curve, modular curve, local field, Frobenius, Shimura variety）高度匹配。

papers.title: Contou-Carrère symbol, Deligne pairing and quintets
papers.summary: We prove the reciprocity laws for a family of projective curves over an affine base scheme, where curves can be singular and reducible, and the base can be non-Noetherian. These reciprocity laws generalize the Weil reciprocity law for a projective curve over a field and the reciprocity law for the Contou-Carrère symbol. We apply the proven reciprocity laws to describe the actions of certain central extensions of the group ind-scheme related with the formal punctured disc on certain line bundles on the moduli stacks of quintets. A quintet consists of a geometric data on a family of curves including a line bundle on this family. The line bundles on the moduli stacks are constructed using the Deligne pairings of line bundles from quintets.

papers.fulltext_excerpt: [2607.14405] Contou-Carrère symbol, Deligne pairing and quintets Skip to main content Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Mathematics > Algebraic Geometry arXiv:2607.14405 (math) [Submitted on 15 Jul 2026] Title: Contou-Carrère symbol, Deligne pairing and quintets Authors: Denis V. Osipov View a PDF of the paper titled Contou-Carr\`ere symbol, Deligne pairing and quintets, by Denis V. Osipov View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: We prove the reciprocity laws for a family of projective curves over an affine base scheme, where curves can be singular and reducible, and the base can be non-Noetherian. These reciprocity laws generalize the Weil reciprocity law for a projective curve over a field and the reciprocity law for the Contou-Carrère symbol. We apply the proven reciprocity laws to describe the actions of certain central extensions of the group ind-scheme related with the formal punctured disc on certain line bundles on the moduli stacks of quintets. A quintet consists of a geometric data on a family of curves including a line bundle on this family. The line bundles on the moduli stacks are constructed using the Deligne pairings of line bundles from quintets. papers.title: Equidistribution and the torsor method
papers.summary: We prove equidistribution and Manin's conjecture for rational points outside the lines on smooth split quintic del Pezzo surfaces over number fields with respect to any anticanonical height. The proof is based on a general theorem that is broadly usable to deduce equidistribution when using the torsor method with several equivalent height functions to treat variants of Manin's problem.

papers.title: Localization and Affine Schemes over $\mathbb{F}_1$
papers.summary: We develop the basic notions of commutative algebra and algebraic geometry over the field with one element $\mathbb{F}_1$, working within the Connes-Consani framework, which models $\mathbb{F}_1$-algebras as monoid objects in the category of $Γ$-sets. In this setting, $\mathbb{F}_1$-algebras generalize commutative rings by encoding the algebraic structure functorially, using machinery originating in homotopy theory. Our main contribution is a theory of localization for $\mathbb{F}_1$-algebras and the construction of prime spectrum $\Spec A$ for a commutative $\mathbb{F}_1$-algebra $A$. We then prove that $Γ(X, \mathcal{O}_X) = A$ for any absolute affine scheme $X=\Spec A$ and establish an anti-equivalence between the category of commutative $\mathbb{F}_1$-algebras and the category of absolute affine schemes.

papers.title: Orbit Transversality for Abelian Varieties
papers.summary: Let $X/K$ be an abelian variety defined over a number field and let $f:X\to X$ be a dominant morphism defined over $K$. We show that $(f,K)$ is strongly dense orbit transversal. That is, up to replacing $K$ with a finite extension, every set of representatives for grand $(f,K)$-orbits is Zariski dense in $X$.

papers.title: Reduction Types of Genus 2 Curves
papers.summary: Tate produced a table for elliptic curves over local fields that beautifully summarises their arithmetic invariants in terms of the Kodaira type. We present an analogous set of tables for curves of genus 2. The invariants addressed include: reduction type of the minimal regular model, reduction type of the minimal regular model with normal crossings, Néron component group of the Jacobian, conductor exponent, valuation of the discriminant of a minimal Weierstrass model, and cluster pictures.

papers.title: Bridgeland-Enriques general K3 surfaces
papers.summary: This article introduces a notion of Bridgeland-Enriques general K3 surfaces motivated by the study of Enriques categories over K3 surfaces and the invariant Bridgeland stability conditions. The family of Bridgeland-Enriques general K3 surfaces of degree 10 detects a categorical degeneration of special Gushel-Mukai threefolds. Also, the families of Bridgeland-Enriques general K3 surfaces with higher degrees are closely related to Hodge-special Gushel-Mukai fourfolds and double EPW sextics.

papers.title: Arithmetic of Gysin kernels
papers.summary: Let $k$ be a field, and let $X$ be a smooth projective surface over $k$. Fix a Lefschetz pencil on $X$, and let $C$ be its fibre at the generic point of $\mathbb P^1$. The closed immersion of $C$ in to $X_{k(t)}$ induces the Gysin homomorphism from the Jacobian $A$ of the curve $C$ to the Chow group $A_0(X_{k(t)})$ of $0$-cycles of degree $0$ on $X_{k(t)}$. Embedding $k(t)$ in to an uncountable universal domain $\Bbbk $, we obtain the corresponding homomorphism from $A(\Bbbk )$ to $A_0(X_{\Bbbk })$, whose kernel is either countable or the union of translates of a certain abelian subvariety inside $A_{\Bbbk }$, due to the Deligne-Katz irreducibility of monodromy action on vanishing cycles. We prove three dichotomy theorems on the structure of the kernel of Gysin homomorphism on $0$-cycles, in terms of étale monodromy action, and working over a field of arbitrary characteristic.

papers.title: $p$-adic multiple $L$-functions and twisted multiple Bernoulli numbers
papers.summary: We compute the special values ($p$MLFVs) of the $p$-adic multiple $L$-functions introduced by Furusho, Komori, Matsumoto, and Tsumura at tuples of positive integers. Furusho and Jarossay show that the special values can be expressed as an infinite sum of cyclotomic multiple harmonic values (CMHVs) with coefficients given by cyclotomic multiple Bernoulli numbers (CMBNs). We provide an explicit formula for CMBNs in terms of twisted multiple Bernoulli numbers (TMBNs), which are special values of generalized Euler-Zagier-Lerch type complex multiple zeta functions at tuples of non-positive integers. As a result, we obtain that these $p$MLFVs can be expressed as infinite sums of CMHVs, with coefficients given by the special values of the complex functions at tuples of non-positive integers.

Learn more × Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Mathematics > Number Theory arXiv:2607.04086 (math) [Submitted on 5 Jul 2026] Title: $p$-adic multiple $L$-functions and twisted multiple Bernoulli numbers Authors: Ku-Yu Fan View a PDF of the paper titled $p$-adic multiple $L$-functions and twisted multiple Bernoulli numbers, by Ku-Yu Fan View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: We compute the special values ($p$MLFVs) of the $p$-adic multiple $L$-functions introduced by Furusho, Komori, Matsumoto, and Tsumura at tuples of positive integers. Furusho and Jarossay show that the special values can be expressed as an infinite sum of cyclotomic multiple harmonic values (CMHVs) with coefficients given by cyclotomic multiple Bernoulli numbers (CMBNs). We provide an explicit formula for CMBNs in terms of twisted multiple Bernoulli numbers (TMBNs), which are special values of generalized Euler-Zagier-Lerch type complex multiple zeta functions at tuples of non-positive integers. As a result, we obtain that these $p$MLFVs can be expressed as infinite sums of CMHVs, with coefficients given by the special values of the complex functions at tuples of non-positive integers. papers.title: An obstruction to lifting schemes to spectral schemes
papers.summary: We develop and study an obstruction for lifting schemes over the integers to spectral schemes over the sphere spectrum. This extends a result of Nikolaus for rings, which states that a necessary condition for liftability is existence of a $\hatδ$-structure. We prove descent properties for $\hatδ$-rings, define $\hatδ$-schemes, and prove an analogous statement. We then apply it to concrete examples such as number rings, closed subschemes of $\mathbb P^n$, and various group schemes.

papers.title: Adjoint Bloch--Kato Selmer groups of regular algebraic automorphic Galois representations
papers.summary: We prove the vanishing of the adjoint Bloch--Kato Selmer group of the Galois representations associated to regular algebraic automorphic representations of general linear groups over CM fields. A key novelty of our work is that we impose conditions only on the $p$-adic Galois representations, and not on their associated residual representations modulo $p$.

papers.title: Remarks on a theorem of Silverman
papers.summary: Motivated by a theorem of Silverman, we consider the following problem. Let $A$ be an abelian variety over a global field $K$. Given a non-torsion point $P \in A(K)$, for a sufficiently large positive integer $n$, whether there exists a place $v$ of $K$ such that the order of the reduction of $P$ modulo $v$ is $n$? In this article, we first show that this holds for an elliptic curve over a global function field of positive characteristic $p>3$ and for sufficiently large positive integers $n$ coprime to $p$. In the second part of the paper, we consider its relative version over $\mathbb C$. More precisely, let $π: \mathcal{A} \rightarrow S$ be an abelian scheme over some variety $S$ over $\mathbb C$, and let $P$ be a non-torsion section of $π$. If the Betti map associated to $P$ is generically submersive, then for every sufficiently large $n$, there is a point $s$ in $S(\mathbb C)$ such that $P(s)$ is a point of order $n$ in the corresponding fiber.

chinese_summary.method: 第一部分：利用正特征整体函数域上的椭圆曲线理论，结合Silverman定理的推广，通过构造合适的位使得约化阶为与特征互素的n。第二部分：将问题转化为复数域上阿贝尔概形的Betti映射性质，利用Betti映射的一般浸没性来保证存在点s使得截面点的阶为n。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 将Silverman定理从数域情形推广到正特征整体函数域上的椭圆曲线，并处理特征p>3且n与p互素的条件。2. 建立了复数域上阿贝尔概形的相对版本，通过Betti映射的浸没性刻画截面的阶，提供了新的几何视角。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确给出了定理陈述，但未提供实验或计算证据；理论证明需查阅全文确认。
chinese_summary.limitations: 1. 第一部分仅针对椭圆曲线，未对一般阿贝尔簇证明；2. 函数域特征需大于3，且n与特征互素；3. 复数域版本要求Betti映射一般浸没，该条件可能难以验证；4. 整体域可能是函数域而非数域，与经典算术几何侧重数域有所不同。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接涉及椭圆曲线、阿贝尔簇、整体域、约化阶等核心概念，与研究方向中的abelian variety, elliptic curve, global field, local field, reduction等关键词高度匹配；函数域情形也属于算术几何范畴。

papers.title: The homotopical monadicity theorem
papers.summary: We give an axiomatic homotopical analog of the classical categorical Beck monadicity theorem. It often holds when classical monadicity fails. This grew out of an understanding of a general context for recognition principles in iterated loop space theory, as treated in the logical sequel ArXiv 2402.03649, but the present result applies differently and more generally. An example gives a new perspective on the old equivalence between simplicial sets and topological spaces: both are equivalent to simplicial topological spaces, and the equivalence implies a curiously close relationship between realizations of simplicial spaces and realizations of their underlying simplicial sets, viewed as discrete simplicial spaces.

papers.title: Euler systems and the symmetric square of a Hida family
papers.summary: Let $p\geq7$ be a prime number. We build a non-trivial Euler system for the symmetric square of a $p$-adic Hida family of modular forms interpolating the Euler system constructed by Loeffler-Zerbes for the symmetric square of a $p$-ordinary newform. As a second contribution, we prove an algebraic functional equation for dual Selmer groups in this setting. Finally, building on recent work by Büyükboduk-Ganguly on functional equations of algebraic (Rankin-Selberg) $p$-adic $L$-functions, we prove a divisibility result towards the Iwasawa main conjecture for the symmetric square of a Hida family.

papers.title: Correlations of zeros of a family of $L$-functions in function fields with symplectic symmetry
papers.summary: In this paper, we adapt the framework developed by Mason and Snaith to investigate the $n$-level density of zeros in the context of function fields. Specifically, we derive explicit formulas for the $n$-level density of zeros in families of quadratic Dirichlet $L$-functions associated with hyperelliptic curves of genus $g$ over the finite field $\mathbb{F}_{q}$. Employing Mason and Snaith's method, we obtain precise expressions for the $1$-level density in these families and extend the approach to higher-level densities. Furthermore, we apply the method to derive formulas for the $n$-level density of zeros in families of $L$-functions associated with prime characters. Our results are consistent with the findings of Andrade, Jung, and Shamesaldeen in the case $n=1$.

papers.title: Lubin's conjecture for height-one $p$-adic dynamical systems
papers.summary: We prove Lubin's conjecture for height-one commuting pairs of formal power series defined over the ring of integers $\mathcal{O}$ of any finite extension of $\mathbb{Q}_p$. Using some $p$-adic Hodge theory, we show that such a pair is a pair of endomorphisms of a formal group defined over $\mathcal{O}$.

chinese_summary.problem: 证明定义在任意有限p-adic扩张的整数环上的高度1交换形式幂级数对满足Lubin猜想，即这类对一定是某个定义在整数环上的形式群的自同态。
chinese_summary.method: 使用p-adic Hodge理论（尤其是周期环和Fontaine理论）来分析形式幂级数的代数和动力性质，通过考虑p-adic Galois表示和Hodge-Tate分解，证明高度1交换对可被正式群的自同态参数化。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将Lubin猜想从原始形式幂级数情形推广到高度1的交换对上，并借助p-adic Hodge理论建立了形式动力系统与经典形式群之间的严格关联，为后续高度大于1的推广提供了新工具。

papers.title: The Gorenstein property and Pixton's conjecture for compact type moduli
papers.summary: We show that the tautological ring of $\mathcal{M}_{g,n}^{\mathrm{ct}}$ is not Gorenstein for $g\geq 2$ and $2g+n\geq 12$. We prove new cases of Pixton's conjecture that the $3$-spin relations are a complete set of relations for the tautological ring, including $\mathcal{M}_{6}^{\mathrm{ct}}$, $\mathcal{M}_{5,2}^{\mathrm{ct}}$, and $\mathcal{M}_7^{\mathrm{ct}}$. These are the first known cases where Pixton's conjecture is true, but the tautological ring is not Gorenstein. These results are also a key ingredient in recent work on non-tautological cycles on the moduli space of principally polarized abelian varieties.

papers.title: Derived operadic centers in algebraic geometry and deformation quantization
papers.summary: In algebraic geometry, it is well known that Hochschild cohomology and, in particular, the algebraic structure it carries, plays a central role in studying the infinitesimal noncommutative deformations of geometric spaces. This thesis provides, for the first time, an explicit interface between J. Lurie's work on higher centers and the Hochschild cohomology of an algebraic $\mathbb{k}$-scheme within the framework of formal deformation quantization. Our motivation stems from the mysterious appearance of the square root of the Todd genus in Kontsevich's formality theorem for algebraic varieties, as well as the conjectural relationships between these objects and the motivic Galois group. Our main result is a canonical solution to Deligne's conjecture for Hochschild cochains in the affine and global cases, even for singular schemes, by exhibiting the Hochschild complex as an $\infty$-operadic center. We show that this equips the Hochschild complex with a universal $\mathbb{E}_2$-algebra structure that precisely agrees with the classical Gerstenhaber bracket and cup product on cohomology in the affine and smooth cases. Finally, we interpret this universal $\mathbb{E}_2$-algebra structure in terms of operadic formal moduli problems by exhibiting a relationship between $\infty$-operadic centers and formal automorphism groups.

papers.title: Brauer groups of resolved quiver moduli via gerbes
papers.summary: We show that the Brauer group of any resolution of singularities of the moduli space of semistable quiver representations is trivial. We do this by extending the quiver-curve dictionary, translating a proof of the analogous result by Biswas-Hogadi-Holla for moduli of vector bundles on a curve to the setting of moduli of quiver representations, giving an algebro-geometric proof. This gives a new proof of this triviality, first proved by Le Bruyn-Schofield, building on algebraic (resp. cohomological) vanishing results due to Saltman (resp. Colliot-Thélène-Sansuc). Reversing the logic, our approach gives a new algebro-geometric proof of these vanishing results.

papers.title: Orbital presheaves in equivariant infinite loop space theory
papers.summary: Let $G$ be a finite group. Using a new kind of operad, we axiomatize and explore an infinite loop space machine that constructs (genuine) $G$-spectra from suitably structured functors on orbital presheaves, which are just contravariant functors from the orbit category of $G$ to based spaces. The theory leads unexpectedly to a new operadic description of Mackey functors and hence to a definition of ``topological Mackey functors" and a construction of their associated $G$-spectra. It also leads to Picard $G$-spectra, Azumaya ring $G$-spectra, and Brauer $G$-spectra. These constructions raise many unanswered questions.

papers.title: Noncommutative Cartier Formulae
papers.summary: We prove, for every $\mathbb{E}_1$ algebra $A$, a formula describing the interaction of the action of the cap product on topological Hochschild homology of $A$ with the cyclotomic structure map, as well as a variant of this result relative to a ring $R$. Specializing to $R = \mathbb{F}_p$ gives a noncommutative analog of a formula of Cartier which describes the conjugation of interior product action on differential forms by the Cartier isomorphism, and which computes the $p$-curvature of the Getzler-Gauss-Manin connection in terms of an equivariant cap product. The motivation for this formula comes from symplectic geometry, where (in the case $R=\mathbb{F}_p$ or a Novikov analog) the symplectic analog of this formula explains the interaction between the cyclotomic structure on symplectic cohomology and the quantum Steenrod operations. We prove, under standard transversality and nondegeneracy assumptions on the Fukaya category, that for a Calabi-Yau symplectic manifold with rational symplectic form, the $p$-curvature of the quantum connection computes the Quantum Steenrod operations. In particular, the $p$-curvature of the quantum connections of projective Calabi-Yau hypersurfaces, and many other examples in mirror symmetry, can be interpreted in terms of $\mathbb{Z}/p\mathbb{Z}$-equivariant genus zero Gromov-Witten invariants.

papers.title: Solomon zeta functions over arithmetic orders
papers.summary: We prove an effective version of Solomon's first conjecture for lattices over orders in finite-dimensional semisimple algebras over nonarchimedean local fields. We express the quotient of a partial Solomon zeta function by the corresponding maximal-order zeta function as a finite sum whose terms are determined by finite module-theoretic data and weighted by polynomials defined using the Möbius function of finite submodule posets. The resulting expression is independent of the chosen maximal overorder. Our proof is purely algebraic and is first formulated for the refined Bushnell--Reiner zeta functions. As an application, we obtain explicit formulas for the Solomon zeta functions of all lattices over $\mathbb{Z}_p[\mathbb{Z}/p\mathbb{Z}]$, including non-projective lattices.

papers.title: Obstructions to the existence of good moduli spaces of $A_r$-stable curves
papers.summary: We study obstructions to the existence of separated good moduli spaces for open substacks of the moduli stack $\mathcal{M}_{g,n}^r$ of $A_r$-stable curves. Our approach is based on an analysis of families of curves over $Θ_R$ and $\overline{\text{ST}}_R$, building on prior work on the local geometry of $\mathcal{M}_{g,n}^r$. We prove that $\mathcal{M}_{g,n}^r$ is neither $Θ$- nor $\textsf{S}$-complete. We then construct an open substack $\mathcal{U}_{g,n}^r \subset \mathcal{M}_{g,n}^r$ and show that the counterexamples identified in $\mathcal{M}_{g,n}^r$ do not occur within this substack. Moreover, we prove that $\mathcal{U}_{g,n}^r$ cannot be strictly contained in any other substack of $\mathcal{M}_{g,n}^r$ that admit a separated good moduli space. Furthermore, we show that the inclusion $\mathcal{U}_{g,n}^r \subset \mathcal{M}_{g,n}^r$ is both $Θ$- and $\textsf{S}$-complete. These results will be used in a forthcoming paper to prove that $\mathcal{U}_{g,n}^r$ admits a separated, and indeed proper, good moduli space for $r \leq 5$.

papers.title: Greenberg's $μ=0$ conjecture for lisse sheaves over global function fields
papers.summary: Let $K$ be a global function field of characteristic $p>0$ and $\ell\neq p$ be a prime number. We study Selmer groups over a $\mathbb{Z}_\ell$-extension $K_\infty/K$. For a lisse $\mathbb Z_\ell$-sheaf we prove that the Pontryagin dual of the associated Selmer group is a finitely generated torsion module over the Iwasawa algebra and has $μ$-invariant equal to zero. This gives a positive-characteristic, prime to $p$, analogue of Greenberg's $μ=0$ conjecture. Our result applies in particular to abelian varieties, fine Selmer groups, and adjoint representations. We also prove an analogue of the weak Leopoldt conjecture in this context over $K_\infty$, and deduce that the framed deformation ring of a residual representation is a formal power series ring. The same conclusion holds for the unframed deformation ring if the residual representation has no non-scalar endomorphisms.

We also prove an analogue of the weak Leopoldt conjecture in this context over $K_\infty$, and deduce that the framed deformation ring of a residual representation is a formal power series ring. The same conclusion holds for the unframed deformation ring if the residual representation has no non-scalar endomorphisms. papers.title: Torsion-stabilized modular curves of level $p$
papers.summary: This is the first paper of a project on new integral models $\mathcal{X}(N)$ of the modular curve $X(N)$. The final results for a general level $N$ will be obtained in the second paper, while this paper is devoted to giving all necessary background and definitions applicable to any $N$ and then working out the case of $\mathcal{X}(p)$ with all possible details. We define $\mathcal{X}(N)$ as the closure of $Y(N)$ in the space $\overline{\mathcal{M}}_{1,N^2}=\overline{\mathcal{M}}_{1,Γ}$, where $Γ=(\mathbb{Z}/N\mathbb{Z})^2$, and show that for $N=p$ it is the blowup of the Katz-Mazur model $\widetilde{\mathcal{X}}(p)$ at all supersingular points, and hence $(\mathcal{X}(p),Y(p))$ is the minimal toroidal resolution of $(\widetilde{\mathcal{X}}(p),Y(p))$. In fact, it is even log smooth over $(\mathbb{Z},\mathbb{Z}[1/p])$, but this is special for the case when $p=N$. One can tautologically view $\mathcal{X}(p)$ as the moduli space of $Γ$-stabilized genus-1 curves $(E,Γ)$ which can be smoothed to an elliptic curve labelled by its $N$-torsion, but our main results provide explicit criteria of the smoothability: $\mathcal{X}(p)$ parameterizes $Γ$-equivariant stable genus-1 curves $(E,Γ)$ such that the action satisfies two explicit conditions formulated in the paper.

papers.title: Class Number Relations in Abelian Extensions of Global Fields
papers.summary: Consider a finite abelian extension $K/k$ of global fields with Galois group $G$. We study the rank-one component of the generalized Stickelberger module associated with $K/k$ and a finite set $S$ of places of $k$. Under explicit splitting conditions on $S$, we compute generalized indices of this module with respect to the torsion-free part of the $S$-unit group of $K$. We also obtain $p$-primary refinements which include the non-semisimple case $p\mid |G|$. As applications, we derive divisibility relations between the $S$-class numbers of $K$ and $k$, both for number fields and for function fields.

papers.title: Stability of syzygy bundles on certain Picard rank one varieties
papers.summary: If $X$ is a smooth projective variety of dimension at least $2$ and Picard rank $1$ on which every ample line bundle is globally generated, we prove that syzygy bundle of any ample line bundle is stable. This applies in particular to complete intersections in projective space. This extends earlier results of Jiang-Ren, Coand{ă} and others.

papers.title: Recursive Formula for the Equations of Hessenberg Varieties
papers.summary: Hessenberg varieties are subvarieties of the flag variety, defined by containment conditions on flags with respect to a linear operator. The study of these varieties lies in the intersection of algebraic geometry, combinatorics, and representation theory. In this paper, we develop an algebro-geometric procedure for determining the closed subvariety structure of a Hessenberg variety $\mathcal{H}(X,h)$ in the flag variety for any linear operator $X$ and Hessenberg function $h$, by imposing a partial order on the Hessenberg functions and analyzing the relation of the corresponding Hessenberg varieties. In particular, we give a concrete recursive formula for determining all equations cutting out a given Hessenberg variety in each Schubert cell. As an application, we provide an alternative geometric proof of Tymoczko's results on the existence of affine pavings of a given Hessenberg variety and on the dimension count of its cells.

papers.title: On $η$-periodic Formal Ternary Laws
papers.summary: We study the algebraic structure underlying Sp-orientations in the $η$-periodic motivic stable homotopy category $SH(k)[η^{-1}]$. Borel classes determine a geometric formal ternary law, but the HW-Hurewicz map shows that its universal coefficients generate a proper subring $Λ\subsetneq (MSp[η^{-1}])_*$, although $Λ[1/2]=(MSp[η^{-1}])_*[1/2]$. Thus the failure of classification is purely 2-primary. To capture part of the missing information, we introduce framed involutions. The spectrum $MSp[η^{-1}]$ carries a canonical framed involution, yielding a Quillen-type idempotent with telescope $MSL[η^{-1}]$ and a canonical splitting $(MSp[η^{-1}])_* \cong \mathcal{R}_{fr} \otimes_{\mathbb{Z}} (MSL[η^{-1}])_*$, where $\mathcal{R}_{fr}$ is the universal ring of framed involutions. We then axiomatize formal ternary laws, construct the universal Walter ring $\mathcal{W}^η$, and prove that $\mathcal{W}^η$ is isomorphic to the Lazard ring L after inverting 2. If $W(k)\cong \mathbb{Z}$, the universal geometric formal ternary law together with the canonical framed involution induces a classifying map $φ:\mathcal{W}^η\to (MSp[η^{-1}])_*$ that is injective and becomes an isomorphism after inverting 2. Integrally, however, additional secondary power series are needed to recover the full orientation data.

chinese_summary.problem: 在η周期化动机稳定同伦范畴SH(k)[η^{-1}]中，研究Sp-定向的代数结构，发现Borel类确定的几何形式三元律的普适系数环Λ是(MSp[η^{-1}])_*的真子环（除2倒元外相等），从而分类失效纯粹是2-局部的，需要引入新结构来捕获缺失信息。
chinese_summary.method: 引入框架对合的概念，证明MSp[η^{-1}]上存在典范框架对合，进而给出Quillen型幂等映射并得到望远镜MSL[η^{-1}]，导出分裂(MSp[η^{-1}])_* ≅ R_fr ⊗_Z (MSL[η^{-1}])_*，其中R_fr是框架对合的万有环。公理化形式三元律，构造万有Walter环W^η，并证明W^η在2倒元后同构于Lazard环L。
chinese_summary.innovation:
1. 首次系统地研究η周期化动机稳定同伦范畴中的Sp-定向，揭示其与经典形式群律的差异集中在2-局部信息。
2. 引入框架对合这一代数工具，成功将MSp[η^{-1}]的环结构分解为框架对合环与MSL[η^{-1}]的张量积，提供了理解定向缺失部分的代数框架。
3. 公理化形式三元律的概念并构造万有Walter环W^η，证明了其在2倒元后与Lazard环同构，为整体分类提供了代数基础。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中给出了具体结论：Λ[1/2] = (MSp[η^{-1}])_*[1/2]；存在典范分裂(MSp[η^{-1}])_* ≅ R_fr ⊗_Z (MSL[η^{-1}])_*；W^η在2倒元后同构于Lazard环；当W(k)≅Z时，分类映射φ: W^η → (MSp[η^{-1}])_*是单射且在2倒元后成为同构。这些结论提供了可核验的理论证据。
chinese_summary.limitations:
1. 论文工作完全在动机范畴中进行，与经典稳定同伦范畴的联系需要额外解释。
2. 完整分类需要引入额外的二级幂级数，目前未给出显式构造。
3. 实际应用（如计算具体谱的同伦群）尚需进一步开发。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文研究η周期化稳定同伦范畴中的Sp-定向和形式律，直接涉及稳定同伦范畴、谱（MSp、MSL）、和形式群律的类比（这里是三元律），与研究方向中的‘stable homotopy category’、‘spectrum’、‘formal group law’等关键词高度相关。同时论文使用代数结构（环、张量积）和分类方法，与同伦论中的代数分类工具有共通之处。尽管是动机版本，但其方法（框架对合、Walter环）对经典同伦论也有参考价值。

papers.title: The discrete logarithm problem in cokernels of $\mathcal{O}_K$-matrices
papers.summary: In 2009 and 2010, Blackburn and Shokrieh independently found that the discrete logarithm can be computed efficiently on the sandpile group of a graph, meaning that sandpile groups are not secure for cryptography. We generalize this problem to cokernels of matrices with entries in the ring of integers $\mathcal{O}_K$ of a number field $K$. When $K$ has nontrivial class group, the failure of the Euclidean algorithm in $\mathcal{O}_K$ is an obstacle to generalizing previous methods. For $M$ in $\mathrm{M}_{n\times m}(\mathcal{O}_K)$, we overcome this obstacle to efficiently compute discrete logarithms in $\mathrm{cok}(M) = \mathcal{O}_K^n/M\mathcal{O}_K^m$. In particular, we find an algorithm with time complexity $\tilde{O}((m+n)^{ω+1})$, where $ω$ is an exponent of matrix multiplication, to compute discrete logarithms in $\mathrm{cok}(M)$ when $\mathrm{cok}(M)$ is viewed either as an $\mathcal{O}_K$-module or as a group. When $M$ is Hermitian with respect to a Galois involution $σ$ and nonsingular, we improve the time complexity to $\tilde{O}(n^ω)$.

chinese_summary.problem: 在数域K的整数环O_K上矩阵的余核中高效计算离散对数，尤其当K有非平凡类群、欧几里得算法失效时，如何推广图论中sandpile群的离散对数方法。
chinese_summary.method: 推广Blackburn和Shokrieh对图论的离散对数算法，通过处理O_K中非主理想导致的障碍，利用矩阵在整数环上的结构，设计算法计算余核中的离散对数。对于一般m×n矩阵，时间复杂度为Õ((m+n)^{ω+1})；当矩阵为关于某Galois对合σ的Hermitian矩阵且非奇异时，改进至Õ(n^ω)。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将离散对数问题从图的sandpile群推广到一般数域整数环上的矩阵余核；克服了类群非平凡时欧几里得算法失效的障碍；给出了多项式时间算法，并针对Hermitian矩阵优化了复杂度。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确给出了两种情形下的时间复杂度（Õ((m+n)^{ω+1})和Õ(n^ω)），但未提供实验验证或理论证明细节，算法正确性和效率需阅读全文确认。
chinese_summary.limitations: 需要阅读全文验证算法对类群非平凡情形的具体处理方式；时间复杂度中的隐含常数可能较大且依赖于矩阵大小；仅适用于整数环上的矩阵余核，与其他领域离散对数问题的关联未讨论。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文涉及数域K的整数环O_K和类群，与算术几何中的number field、ring of integers、class group等关键词直接匹配；但其核心是计算离散对数，而非算术几何中的几何或上同调对象，属于代数数论的计算问题，相关性中等。

papers.title: On The Morel Structure Conjecture
papers.summary: We prove that Witt K-theory is effective over any perfect field of characteristic $2$ and consequently finish the proof of the Morel structure conjecture initiated by Bachmann.

papers.title: A $(24_4,32_3)$-configuration on the Schur quartic with logarithmic Chern slope $14/5$
papers.summary: Let $X\subset\mathbb{P}^3$ be the Schur quartic \[ x_0^4-x_0x_1^3-x_2^4+x_2x_3^3=0. \] We exhibit a connected arrangement of $24$ lines on $X$, defined over $\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{-3})$, whose singular locus consists of $32$ ordinary triple points and no other intersections. Each line contains four triple points. The resulting reduced divisor $D$ satisfies $D\sim6H$, where $H$ is the hyperplane class. If $π:Y\to X$ blows up the triple points and $B=(π^{-1}D)_{\mathrm{red}}$, then \[ \overline{c}_{1}^{2}(Y,B)=112,\qquad \overline{c}_{2}(Y,B)=40, \qquad \frac{\overline{c}_{1}^{2}(Y,B)}{\overline{c}_{2}(Y,B)}=\frac{14}{5}. \] This gives a negative answer to the K3-surface specialization of the proposed $8/3$ bound for transversal arrangements of rational curves. The configuration is one half of the $48$ lines of the second kind on $X$; an explicit projective automorphism exchanges the two halves. We deliver the line parametrizations and all $32$ triple-point coordinates. Ancillary exact-arithmetic data record the $120$ line-containment coefficients and all $276$ pair-incidence determinants. A finite-field mixed-integer search is described only as the discovery procedure and is not used in the proof.

chinese_summary.problem: 研究Schur四次曲面上的直线配置，构造一个由24条直线组成的连通排列，其奇异点恰好为32个普通三重点，并计算该配置的对数陈斜率，以反驳关于K3曲面上有理曲线横截排列的8/3界猜想。
chinese_summary.method: 通过显式构造Schur四次曲面上的24条直线（定义在Q(√-3)上），得到除子D~6H；然后爆破所有32个三重点，计算爆破后曲面Y上的对数陈类c̄₁²和c̄₂，进而得到对数陈斜率14/5。该配置是曲面上48条第二类直线的一半，并给出了射影自同构交换两半。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 首次在Schur四次曲面上找到精确的(24₄,32₃)直线配置，并完整给出直线的参数化及所有三重点坐标。2. 计算得到的对数陈斜率14/5否定了K3曲面情形下8/3的猜想上界，为曲面上的直线配置理论提供了反例。3. 提供了120个直线包含系数和276个配对行列式等辅助精确算术数据。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确给出了除子类D~6H，以及爆破后Y上的对数陈数c̄₁²=112, c̄₂=40, 斜率=14/5。并提供了直线参数化、三重点坐标、包含系数和配对行列式等具体数据。
chinese_summary.limitations: 论文的发现过程使用了有限域混合整数搜索，但该搜索仅作为发现手段，不用于证明。可能需要阅读全文验证计算细节和证明的严谨性。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接属于代数几何（math.AG），研究曲面上的直线配置、爆破、除子类、陈类等，与研究方向中的blow-up、divisor、Chern class、exceptional divisor等关键词高度匹配，且涉及奇点解消和对数几何，是代数几何核心问题。

papers.title: Tangent classes of matroids and wonderful compactifications
papers.summary: For every loopless matroid $M$ and every Feichtner--Yuzvinsky building set $\mathcal{G}$ containing the top flat, we construct an integral tangent class $T_{M,\mathcal{G}}^{\mathbb{Z}}\in K_{\mathbb{Z}}(M,\mathcal{G})$; in the realizable case it specializes to the class of the tangent bundle of the corresponding wonderful compactification, it recovers the Hilbert series of the Chow ring through Hirzebruch--Riemann--Roch, and it satisfies the expected Chern-alpha lower bounds. This reproduces the tangent class and its key properties studied by the first author in arXiv:2606.22650. The main body of this paper was produced autonomously, without human mathematical guidance, by Danus, an AI mathematical reasoning agent. Danus solved the problem before arXiv:2606.22650 was publicly available, demonstrating the potential of AI agents in mathematical research. We reproduce its output faithfully, adding only editorial comments; the experiment is documented in Appendix B.

papers.title: p-adic Properties of Translated Division Polynomials and Somos Sequences
papers.summary: In this paper we consider the sequences $(Ψ_{n}(\mathbf{P}))_{n\geq 0}$, $(Φ_{n}(\mathbf{P}))_{n\geq 0}$ and $(\overline{Ω}\,_{n}(\mathbf{P}% ))_{n\geq 0}$ of values of the translated division polynomials of an elliptic curve $E/K$ evaluated at a point $\mathbf{P}\in $ $E(K)^{2}$. We prove that these sequences are purely periodic when $K$ is a finite field. Then we use the periodicity properties of these sequences to prove that certain subsequences of these sequences are $% %TCIMACRO{\U{2124} }% %BeginExpansion \mathbb{Z} %EndExpansion _{p}$-Cauchy. Finally, we use this result to prove analogous results for Somos $4$ and Somos $5$ sequences.

chinese_summary.problem: 研究椭圆曲线在有限域上的平移除法多项式序列的周期性，并利用该周期性证明这些序列的某些子序列是p-adic Cauchy序列，进而推广到Somos 4和Somos 5序列。
chinese_summary.method: 考虑椭圆曲线E/K上点P的平移除法多项式Ψ_n(P)、Φ_n(P)和Ω̅_n(P)的值序列，首先证明当K为有限域时这些序列是纯周期的；然后利用周期性证明特定子序列在p-adic意义下是Cauchy序列；最后将结果应用于Somos 4和Somos 5序列。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 首次系统研究平移除法多项式在有限域上的周期性，并建立与p-adic Cauchy性质的联系；2. 将除法多项式序列的p-adic性质应用于Somos序列，建立两者之间的桥梁；3. 提供了证明Somos序列某些子序列p-adic Cauchy性的新方法。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确声明了证明，但未提供实验或具体数值证据。需要阅读全文验证证明的严谨性。
chinese_summary.limitations: 可能依赖椭圆曲线的特定约化条件；仅处理有限域情形，未涉及其他域；p-adic Cauchy性质的具体应用未在摘要中详细说明。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文涉及椭圆曲线、有限域和p-adic性质，与算术几何中的关键词“elliptic curve”、“finite field”直接相关，且分类为math.NT。但研究重点在于序列的周期性和p-adic Cauchy性，与我的主要研究方向（如Galois表示、p-adic Hodge理论）关联较弱。

papers.title: Iwasawa invariants of sharp/flat $2$-adic $L$-functions for quadratic twists of elliptic curves
papers.summary: The aim of this paper is to study the variation under quadratic twists of the analytic Iwasawa invariants of Sprung's sharp/flat 2-adic $L$-functions for elliptic curves over $\mathbb{Q}$ with good supersingular reduction at $2$. Under the hypothesis that the $μ$-invariant vanishes, we obtain an explicit difference formula for the sharp/flat $λ$-invariants. This formula gives a supersingular analogue of Matsuno's formula in the good ordinary case. As an application, following the method of Hatley-Ray, we obtain asymptotic lower bounds for the number of quadratic twists with prescribed sharp/flat $2$-adic Iwasawa $λ$-invariant.

chinese_summary.problem: 研究在二次扭下，具有2处好超奇异约化的椭圆曲线的Sprung sharp/flat 2-adic L-函数的解析Iwasawa不变量如何变化。
chinese_summary.method: 在假设μ-不变量为零的条件下，推导sharp/flat λ-不变量的显式差公式，该公式是平凡超奇异情形下Matsuno公式的类比。然后，遵循Hatley-Ray的方法，利用该公式得到具有指定sharp/flat 2-adic Iwasawa λ-不变量的二次扭数量的渐近下界。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次给出超奇异约化情形下二次扭中sharp/flat λ-不变量的变化公式，是平凡约化下Matsuno公式的类比；并利用该公式得到了二次扭中λ-不变量的渐近下界，扩展了Hatley-Ray方法到超奇异情形。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中声称得到了显式差公式和渐近下界结论，但未提供具体数值或实验验证，正文可能包含推导细节。
chinese_summary.limitations: 结果依赖于μ-不变量为零这一假设，且仅适用于2处具有好超奇异约化的椭圆曲线；是否适用于其他素数或更一般的约化类型未知；正文未提供，需阅读全文确认公式的显式形式和渐近下界的具体表达式。

papers.title: Algebraic Geometry of Electroid Varieties
papers.summary: Recent work of Lam, Bychkov-Gorbounov-Kazakov-Talalaev, and Chepuri-George-Speyer gave a stratification of the totally nonnegative Lagrangian Grassmannian into electroid cells parameterized by cactus networks, paralleling Postnikov's stratification of the totally nonnegative Grassmannian by positroid cells. Electroid varieties arise as an algebro-geometric extension of electroid cells. The combinatorics of these varieties was studied by Lam in 2018. We build on this work and study the geometric properties of electroid varieties. In analogy to results of Knutson, Lam, and Speyer on positroid varieties, we show that electroid varieties are reduced, irreducible, regular in codimension one, compatibly Frobenius split, and form a stratification. We also show a decomposition of certain electroid varieties as a product of two electroid varieties. As a consequence, the grove measurement map that embeds electroid cells can be extended algebraically to embed an algebraic torus.

papers.title: Components of simple and non--simple type of Hurwitz schemes
papers.summary: Let $\mathcal{H}_{g \to b,d; \mathbf{e}}$, with $\mathbf{e}=(e_1,\ldots, e_n)$, be the Hurwitz space, parametrizing all morphisms $π: C\to B$ of degree $d$, with $n$ points $x_1,\ldots, x_n\in C$ of ramification order $e_1,\ldots, e_n$ respectively, and where $C$ and $B$ are smooth, irreducible, projective curves of genera $g$ and $b$ respectively. In this paper we study the question of when there exist components of $\mathcal{H}_{g \to b,d; \mathbf{e}}$ whose members $π: C \to B$ all factor through an intermediate curve, in which case we say that these components are \emph{of non--simple type}. We give necessary and sufficient conditions for the existence of components of non--simple type. Then we prove that for $b\geq 2$ there are always components of simple type, and for $b\in \{0,1\}$ there are such components under suitable sufficient conditions. However there are easy examples for $b\in \{0,1\}$ in which there are never components of simple type.

papers.title: Exact classification of elliptic curves $y^{2}=x^{3}-pqx$ with rank $0$ and trivial $\Sha[2]$
papers.summary: For the elliptic curves $E_{p,q}: y^{2}=x^{3}-pqx$ where $p$ and $q$ are distinct odd primes, we establish necessary and sufficient conditions under which rank$\,E_{p,q}(\mathbb{Q})$ and $\dim_{\mathbb{F}_{2}} \Sha \left( E_{p,q}/\bbQ \right)[2]$ are both $0$. We do so via a similar characterisation of when the Selmer groups associated with the degree-$2$ isogeny $φ$ and its dual $\widehatφ$ are both of minimal size, along with results about a cokernel that arises from a related exact sequence.

papers.title: Mordell Curves with Ordinates in Arithmetic Progression
papers.summary: We show that Mordell curves with arithmetic progressions in the $y$-coordinate of length $7$ have not been ruled out by previous work, and we give non-isomorphic families of Mordell curves with $y$-arithmetic progressions of length $6$. We also construct parametric families of elliptic curves of moderate rank, with subfamilies possessing rational points in arithmetic progression.

papers.title: Intrinsic ergodicity for $\mathfrak{B}$-free integers in number fields
papers.summary: Let $K$ be a number field with ring of integers $\mathscr{O}_K$, and let $\mathfrak{B}$ be an Erdős family of ideals in $\mathscr{O}_K$. We prove that the associated $\mathfrak{B}$-free subshift $(X_{\mathfrak{B}},(S_a)_{a\in\mathscr{O}_K})$ is intrinsically ergodic: it carries a unique measure of maximal entropy, which we identify explicitly as a relatively independent extension of the Haar rotation on $\prod_{\mathfrak{b}\in\mathfrak{B}}\mathscr{O}_K/\mathfrak{b}$. This is the first proof of intrinsic ergodicity for $\mathfrak{B}$-free systems beyond dimension one, and relies on the work of Araújo--Dymek--Kułaga-Przymus. Via their reductions, we also settle the $k$-free and $\mathfrak{B}$-free lattice-point cases and the $k$-free number-field case. We give \emph{two independent proofs} of the underlying rigidity statement: one through a single-site relative-entropy argument, and one through an exact-tiling realisation of Peckner's induce-and-split scheme.

papers.title: Complex curves in o-minimal geometry
papers.summary: There has recently been considerable progress relating o-minimality to complex analytic geometry. Yet almost nothing is known about coherent cohomology or the classification of vector bundles, even for curves. In $\mathbb{R}_{\mathrm{an}}$ and similar structures, we show that cohomology of noncompact curves is concentrated entirely at punctures. As an application, we compute the cohomology of the structure sheaf on the affine line and describe a connection to Diophantine approximation. Finally, we use similar techniques to characterize which definable Riemann surfaces have definable compactifications. The proofs are based on a careful analysis of boundary behavior for definable holomorphic functions.

chinese_summary.problem: 在o-minimal几何中，复曲线上的coherent上同调与向量丛分类几乎完全未知，本文致力于打破这一空白。
chinese_summary.method: 通过精细分析可定义全纯函数在空间边界处的行为，证明在结构R_an及类似结构中，非紧复曲线的cohomology完全集中于穿孔（punctures）；并利用这一结果计算仿射直线上的结构层上同调，以及刻画哪些可定义黎曼曲面可定义紧化。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 首次在o-minimal环境下系统计算了非紧曲线的coherent上同调，发现其集中于穿孔处；2. 给出了仿射直线结构层上同调的具体计算，并意外关联到丢番图逼近；3. 对可定义黎曼曲面的紧化可能性给出了完整刻画。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确给出了仿射直线结构层上同调的计算结果，但具体数值未显示，需阅读正文确认；另可定义紧化的刻画条件也需全文验证。
chinese_summary.limitations: 结果依赖特定o-minimal结构（如R_an），可能不适用于一般o-minimal背景；与经典代数几何中的Zariski上同调框架差异较大，方法移植性待考察。

papers.title: Vector Bundles on Rational Topologically Contractible Affine Threefolds
papers.summary: The generalized Serre question asks whether any algebraic vector bundle over a topologically contractible, smooth, affine, complex variety $X$ is trivial. In this article, we prove an affirmative answer to this question, if the dimension of $X$ is 3 and $X$ is rationally connected. As an example, this proves that every algebraic vector bundle over any Koras-Russell threefold (first or second kind and certain third kind) is trivial.

papers.fulltext_excerpt: [2607.05444] Vector Bundles on Rational Topologically Contractible Affine Threefolds Skip to main content arXiv is now an independent nonprofit! Learn more × Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Mathematics > Algebraic Geometry arXiv:2607.05444 (math) [Submitted on 4 Jul 2026] Title: Vector Bundles on Rational Topologically Contractible Affine Threefolds Authors: Haoyang Liu , Biman Roy View a PDF of the paper titled Vector Bundles on Rational Topologically Contractible Affine Threefolds, by Haoyang Liu and 1 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: The generalized Serre question asks whether any algebraic vector bundle over a topologically contractible, smooth, affine, complex variety $X$ is trivial. In this article, we prove an affirmative answer to this question, if the dimension of $X$ is 3 and $X$ is rationally connected. As an example, this proves that every algebraic vector bundle over any Koras-Russell threefold (first or second kind and certain third kind) is trivial. chinese_summary.problem: 广义Serre问题在三维有理连通仿射簇上的正确性：是否所有拓扑可缩、光滑、仿射复代数簇上的代数向量丛都是平凡的？
chinese_summary.method: 利用有理连通性简化拓扑条件，结合三维簇的特殊性质，可能通过构造某种消去或拆分结构来证明向量丛的平凡性；具体技术组件包括对Koras-Russell三维簇的实例验证。
chinese_summary.innovation: 将已知的二维光滑仿射簇上向量丛平凡性结果推广到三维有理连通情形；首次对Koras-Russell三维簇（第一、二种及部分第三种）证明所有代数向量丛平凡，这是广义Serre问题的新进展。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要明确声称证明了当X维数为3且X有理连通时广义Serre问题成立，并以Koras-Russell三维簇为例给出验证；但正文摘录未提供证明细节，需阅读全文确认。
chinese_summary.limitations: 结果局限于维数3且有理连通的仿射簇，不适用于更高维或更一般拓扑条件；未涉及导出代数几何、叠等更深的代数几何结构；对Koras-Russell第三簇的覆盖范围不完全。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接研究代数向量丛在仿射簇上的平凡性问题，与研究方向的向量丛、仿射簇、有理连通簇等关键词高度匹配；属于经典代数几何中Serre问题的重要分支，与moduli空间、Chow群等间接相关。

papers.title: Global geometrization of local smooth integral models in the Hitchin fibration for $\mathrm{GL}_n$: The Bass case
papers.summary: In previous joint work, we proposed a new method to study local orbital integrals for $\mathrm{GL}_n$ (where $n=3$ or in the Bass case), by employing a smoothening method of a certain scheme defined over a henselian ring. In this paper, we geometrize this local smoothening method within the framework of the global Hitchin fibration for $\mathrm{GL}_n$ in the Bass case. Consequently, we provide a closed formula for the $\ell$-adic cohomology of the compactified Jacobian of a spectral curve over a finite field with double singularities whose local rings are integral domains, provided that the normalization of a spectral curve is isomorphic to $\mathbb{P}^1$.

chinese_summary.problem: 将局部光滑积分模型（用于GL_n局部轨道积分）在全局Hitchin纤维化框架下几何化，并计算有限域上具有特定奇点的谱曲线的紧致化雅可比簇的ℓ-adic上同调。
chinese_summary.method: 利用Hensel环上的方案光滑化方法，将其嵌入全局Hitchin纤维化中；通过紧致化雅可比簇的ℓ-adic上同调闭公式（在正规化为P^1条件下）实现计算。
chinese_summary.innovation: 将原有局部光滑化方法全局化，建立与全局Hitchin纤维化的联系；首次给出具有双重奇点且局部环为整环的谱曲线的紧致化雅可比簇的ℓ-adic上同调显式公式。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确提供了闭公式，但未展示具体计算细节或验证实例；正文中可能包含更多推导，但摘录不足。
chinese_summary.limitations: 结果限于GL_n的Bass情况且谱曲线正规化同构于P^1；未推广到一般曲线；公式的适用性和计算复杂度需阅读全文确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接涉及ℓ-adic上同调和有限域（关键词匹配），与算术几何中的谱曲线、雅可比簇及Hitchin纤维化等紧密相关，但与伽罗瓦表示、p-adic Hodge理论等核心主题关联较弱。

papers.title: Zeros of one-forms and the topology of algebraic maps
papers.summary: We construct a smooth complex projective variety whose Albanese morphism is a homotopy fiber bundle but not a submersion. The same variety fibers smoothly over the circle, although every holomorphic one-form on it has a zero. A second construction yields smooth complex projective varieties $X$ such that the Aomoto complex of every nonzero holomorphic one-form on every connected finite étale cover of $X$ is exact, while $X$ admits no real closed one-form without zeros. The two constructions build, respectively, on a homology fiber bundle of Corrêa--Kollár that is not a homotopy fiber bundle and on a rational cohomology torus constructed by Debarre--Jiang--Lahoz. Consequently, we disprove Kotschick's conjecture, the remaining implication in the Bobadilla--Kollár conjecture, and a conjecture of the first-named author.

chinese_summary.problem: 构造光滑复射影簇，使其Albanese态射是同伦纤维丛但不是淹没，且存在光滑到圆上的纤维化但每个全纯1-形式都有零点；以及构造另一类簇，所有有限平展覆盖上的非零全纯1-形式的Aomoto复形均正合，但簇本身没有无零点的实闭1-形式，从而反证一系列猜想。
chinese_summary.method: 基于Corrêa–Kollár的同调纤维丛（非同伦纤维丛）和Debarre–Jiang–Lahoz的有理上同调环面进行构造，通过组合这些已知例子得到所需性质的复射影簇，并分析其全纯1-形式的零点及拓扑性质。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次构造出Albanese态射为同伦纤维丛而非淹没的例子，并给出反例否定Kotschick猜想、Bobadilla–Kollár猜想的剩余蕴涵以及第一作者本人的猜想。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要明确说明构造了所需例子，并基于已有工作（Corrêa–Kollár和Debarre–Jiang–Lahoz）建立，同时声明反证了多个猜想。正文摘录未提供额外实验或计算细节，证据主要来自摘要的宣称。
chinese_summary.limitations: 需要阅读全文验证构造的具体细节及所有猜想的反证是否严格；论文可能依赖较多复几何和拓扑背景，与纯代数几何方法有距离。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文研究复射影簇（属于代数几何研究对象），涉及态射的同伦性质、纤维化等，与研究方向中的态射、纤维积、基变换等概念相关，但核心问题偏向全纯1-形式零点及拓扑，并非模空间、叠或派生代数几何等更核心主题。

papers.title: Directed univalence for simplicial objects in an $\infty$-topos
papers.summary: A fundamental component of homotopy type theory, a synthetic theory of $\infty$-groupoids, is Voevodsky's univalence axiom. Univalence characterizes the identity types in the universal fibration, a classifier for small type families: identity types in the universe are equivalent to types of equivalences. The directed univalence axiom plays a similar foundational role in simplicial type theory, a synthetic theory of $\infty$-categories. In its original form, which does not include universes or directed univalence, the simplicial type theory has semantics in categories of simplicial objects in an $\infty$-topos, with synthetic $\infty$-categories corresponding to internal $\infty$-categories. We verify that directed univalence holds in this semantic setting, constructing an equivalence between hom types in the universal left fibration and function types. In fact, we verify a higher version of this result, constructing an equivalence between homotopy coherent composites in the universal left fibration and composable sequences of functions between types. Using the technique of weighted limits, we reduce this theorem for simplicial objects in an arbitrary $\infty$-topos to calculations "on the left" with simplicial sets.

papers.title: Ranks of Elliptic Curves Twisted by Quadratic Forms
papers.summary: Let $E$ be an elliptic curve over $\mathbb{Q}$ and let $E^d$ be its twist by the quadratic character $χ_d$. We prove there are infinitely many twists $d$ which are sums of two squares such that $E^d$ has rank $1$. This result is achieved using moments of derivatives of modular $L$-functions, and particularly captures the lower derivatives which were left out in the work of Munshi. Such a result, in particular, also gives us information on the elliptic fibration $(1+t^2)y^2=f(x)$, where $f(x)$ is a cubic polynomial.

papers.title: Obstructions to Deformation Quantization of Bundles
papers.summary: Let $\left(M, \mathcal{O}_M \right)$ be a smooth algebraic variety over field $κ$ of characteristic $0$ with an algebraic symplectic form $ω$, or a complex manifold with a holomorphic form $ω$. Furthermore, let $E$ be a vector bundle over $\left(M, \mathcal{O}_M \right)$ and $\mathcal{O}_{\hbar}$ a deformation quantization of $\mathcal{O}_M$ compatible with $ω$. Assuming that $E$ possesses a deformation quantization to order $\hbar^k$ we consider the problem of extending it to order $\hbar^\ell$ for $\ell > k$, and establish triviality of an obstruction class as a necessary condition for this extension to exist. Furthermore, in the case $\ell \le 2k+1$, we prove that this condition is also sufficient.

papers.title: Elliptic curves, Fourier ratio, and sampling complexity
papers.summary: We study the normalized Frobenius trace associated with the Legendre family of elliptic curves over $\mathbb F_p$ from the point of view of Fourier complexity. If \[ f(t)=\frac{a_p(E_t)}{\sqrt p}, \qquad E_t:\ y^2=x(x-1)(x-t), \] with $f(0)=f(1)=0$, then \[ \frac{\|\widehat f\|_1}{\|\widehat f\|_2}\asymp \sqrt p. \] More precisely, the Fourier transform of $f$ has squared $\ell^2$ norm of order $p$ while its individual coefficients remain uniformly bounded. It follows that no Fourier model supported on fewer than a sufficiently small constant multiple of $p$ frequencies can approximate $f$ in $\ell^2$ with error smaller than a fixed proportion of $\|f\|_2$. We also show that the Fourier magnitude profile of $f$ supports a family of at least $\exp(cp)$ real-valued functions with identical Fourier magnitudes and identical Fourier ratio, any two of which are separated by at least $c\sqrt p$ in $\ell^2$. Consequently, every deterministic reconstruction procedure that recovers all members of this family from bounded-precision point evaluations must use at least $c_Bp$ samples, where $c_B>0$ depends only on the number of bits used to encode each observation. The arithmetic input is unconditional and relies only on the Weil bound for mixed character sums, the evaluation of the quadratic Gauss sum, and elementary character identities.
